embeddingStatus.title: Vector index status
embeddingStatus.noSignature: No signature yet. It is computed automatically after the first save.
embeddingStatus.empty: No index data yet. This appears after the embedding service is configured.
embeddingStatus.needsReindex: Stale vectors detected. Rebuild the index to restore retrieval quality.

toast.sessionExpiredDescription: Please sign in again to continue.
toast.unknownError: Request failed. Please try again later.
toast.embeddingModelChangedDescription: Existing vectors were marked stale. Rebuild the index in the status panel to vectorize all files again.

validation.embeddingRequired: Enable vector retrieval and configure both the Embedding service URL and model first.
validation.messageEmbeddingRequiredBeforeSemantic: Enable message embedding before semantic context recall.
validation.tesseractBaseURLRequired: Tesseract OCR service URL is required.
validation.rapidOCRBaseURLRequired: Rapid OCR service URL is required.
validation.paddleOCRBaseURLRequired: Paddle OCR service URL is required.
validation.tencentOCRRequired: Tencent Cloud OCR SecretId, SecretKey, and region are required.
validation.aliyunOCRRequired: Alibaba Cloud OCR AccessKey ID, AccessKey Secret, and region are required.
validation.llmOCRBaseURLRequired: LLM OCR service URL is required.

max_message_files.label: Attachment limit
max_message_files.description: Maximum number of attachments allowed in one chat message.

max_upload_file_bytes.label: Default size limit
max_upload_file_bytes.description: Default size limit for a single attachment. The UI uses MB.

user_storage_quota_bytes.label: User storage quota
user_storage_quota_bytes.description: Maximum total file storage per user. The UI uses MB; set 0 for unlimited.

allowed_mime_types.label: Attachment MIME allowlist
allowed_mime_types.description: Allowed attachment MIME types. Separate multiple values with commas.

image_max_bytes.label: Image size limit
image_max_bytes.description: Override the size limit for image attachments. Falls back to the default attachment limit when empty.
image_max_bytes.placeholder: Leave empty to use the default attachment limit

doc_max_bytes.label: Document size limit
doc_max_bytes.description: Override the size limit for document attachments. Falls back to the default attachment limit when empty.
doc_max_bytes.placeholder: Leave empty to use the default attachment limit

full_context_limit_enabled.label: Full-text injection limits
full_context_limit_enabled.description: When enabled, full-text injection is limited by byte size, token budget, and PDF pages. When disabled, these limits are ignored.

file_full_context_max_bytes.label: Full-text byte limit
file_full_context_max_bytes.description: Maximum extracted text bytes allowed for full-context injection. Leave empty or use 0 for no byte limit.

full_context_max_tokens.label: Full-text token limit
full_context_max_tokens.description: Maximum token budget allowed for full-context injection. Leave empty or use 0 for no token limit.

full_context_pdf_max_pages.label: Full-text page limit
full_context_pdf_max_pages.description: Maximum PDF pages allowed for full-context injection. Leave empty or use 0 for no page limit.

embedding_enabled.label: Enable Embedding
embedding_enabled.description: Enable file vectorization and vector retrieval. Related pipelines are disabled when this is off.

embedding_host.label: Embedding service URL *
embedding_host.description: Embedding service URL. The service must be compatible with the OpenAI /embeddings API.

embedding_key.label: Embedding auth key
embedding_key.description: Auth key used when calling the Embedding service.

embedding_timeout_seconds.label: Embedding timeout
embedding_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum wait time for one Embedding API request, in seconds.

embedding_output_dimensions.label: Vector dimensions
embedding_output_dimensions.description: Vector dimensions used consistently for storage and retrieval.

embedding_normalize.label: Normalize vectors
embedding_normalize.description: Normalize vectors before storage and retrieval.

embed_trigger_on_upload.label: Auto-vectorize
embed_trigger_on_upload.description: Trigger Embedding asynchronously after file upload completes.

embed_batch_size.label: Batch size
embed_batch_size.description: Number of text chunks sent in one Embedding API request.

embed_chunk_size_tokens.label: Chunk size
embed_chunk_size_tokens.description: Document vectorization chunk size, estimated by tokens.

rag_top_k.label: Retrieved chunks
rag_top_k.description: Number of RAG chunks returned and injected.

engine.label: Extraction engine
engine.description: Primary engine used for file content extraction.

tika_auth_token.label: Tika auth key
tika_auth_token.description: Auth key sent when calling the Tika service.

tika_timeout_seconds.label: Tika timeout
tika_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum wait time for one Tika parsing request, in seconds.

docling_auth_token.label: Docling auth key
docling_auth_token.description: Auth key sent when calling the Docling service.

docling_timeout_seconds.label: Docling timeout
docling_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum wait time for one Docling parsing request, in seconds.

mineru_source.label: MinerU service type
mineru_source.description: Choose MinerU cloud service or a self-hosted service.

mineru_auth_token.label: MinerU auth key
mineru_auth_token.description: Token or API key used when calling MinerU.

mineru_timeout_seconds.label: MinerU timeout
mineru_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum wait time for one MinerU parsing request, in seconds.

image_ocr_enabled.label: Image OCR
image_ocr_enabled.description: Send image attachments through OCR and generate text for retrieval.

pdf_ocr_fallback_enabled.label: PDF OCR fallback
pdf_ocr_fallback_enabled.description: Use OCR fallback when native PDF text extraction fails or has poor quality.

ocr_engine.label: OCR engine
ocr_engine.description: Shared OCR engine for image OCR and PDF OCR fallback.

tesseract_ocr_auth_token.label: Tesseract OCR auth key
tesseract_ocr_auth_token.description: Auth key sent when calling Tesseract OCR.

tesseract_ocr_timeout_seconds.label: Tesseract OCR timeout
tesseract_ocr_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum wait time for one Tesseract OCR request, in seconds.

rapidocr_auth_token.label: Rapid OCR auth key
rapidocr_auth_token.description: Auth key sent when calling Rapid OCR.

rapidocr_timeout_seconds.label: Rapid OCR timeout
rapidocr_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum wait time for one Rapid OCR request, in seconds.

paddle_ocr_auth_token.label: Paddle OCR auth key
paddle_ocr_auth_token.description: Auth key sent when calling Paddle OCR.

paddle_ocr_timeout_seconds.label: Paddle OCR timeout
paddle_ocr_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum wait time for one Paddle OCR request, in seconds.

tencent_ocr_secret_id.label: Tencent Cloud SecretId *
tencent_ocr_secret_id.description: SecretId required for Tencent Cloud OCR API.

tencent_ocr_secret_key.label: Tencent Cloud SecretKey *
tencent_ocr_secret_key.description: SecretKey required for Tencent Cloud OCR API.

tencent_ocr_region.label: Tencent Cloud region
tencent_ocr_region.description: Request region for Tencent Cloud OCR API.

tencent_ocr_endpoint.label: Tencent Cloud endpoint
tencent_ocr_endpoint.description: Endpoint for Tencent Cloud OCR API.

tencent_ocr_timeout_seconds.label: Tencent Cloud OCR timeout
tencent_ocr_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum wait time for one Tencent Cloud OCR request, in seconds.

aliyun_ocr_access_key_id.label: Alibaba Cloud AccessKey ID *
aliyun_ocr_access_key_id.description: AccessKey ID required for Alibaba Cloud OCR API.

aliyun_ocr_access_key_secret.label: Alibaba Cloud AccessKey Secret *
aliyun_ocr_access_key_secret.description: AccessKey Secret required for Alibaba Cloud OCR API.

aliyun_ocr_region.label: Alibaba Cloud region
aliyun_ocr_region.description: Request region for Alibaba Cloud OCR API.

aliyun_ocr_endpoint.label: Alibaba Cloud endpoint
aliyun_ocr_endpoint.description: Endpoint for Alibaba Cloud OCR API.

aliyun_ocr_timeout_seconds.label: Alibaba Cloud OCR timeout
aliyun_ocr_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum wait time for one Alibaba Cloud OCR request, in seconds.

llm_ocr_auth_token.label: LLM OCR auth key
llm_ocr_auth_token.description: API key used when calling the LLM OCR service.

llm_ocr_model.label: LLM OCR model *
llm_ocr_model.description: Vision model name used for OCR.

llm_ocr_timeout_seconds.label: LLM OCR timeout
llm_ocr_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum wait time for one LLM OCR request, in seconds.

llm_ocr_prompt.label: LLM OCR prompt
llm_ocr_prompt.description: OCR instruction sent to the vision model.

message_embedding_enabled.label: Message embedding
message_embedding_enabled.description: Generate message vectors asynchronously after each conversation turn. Requires an available Embedding service.

semantic_context_enabled.label: Semantic context recall
semantic_context_enabled.description: Recall historically relevant snippets and inject them into context before sending a message.

rag_enabled.label: RAG
rag_enabled.description: Allow files to enter the retrieval-augmented pipeline. Requires an available Embedding service.

rag_min_similarity.label: Similarity threshold
rag_min_similarity.description: Minimum similarity threshold for injecting retrieved chunks.

rag_token_budget.label: Injected token budget
rag_token_budget.description: Token budget available for injecting retrieved chunks into context.

rag_fetch_multiplier.label: Fetch multiplier
rag_fetch_multiplier.description: Multiplier for candidate retrieval. The system fetches extra candidates before reranking and filtering.

rag_wait_ready_ms.label: Ready wait
rag_wait_ready_ms.description: Maximum time to wait for vectorization before sending a request, in milliseconds.

rag_query_history_turns.label: Query history turns
rag_query_history_turns.description: Recent user turns included when generating the retrieval query.

rag_retrieval_cache_ttl_seconds.label: Retrieval cache TTL
rag_retrieval_cache_ttl_seconds.description: RAG retrieval result cache duration, in seconds.

rag_hybrid_enabled.label: Hybrid retrieval (BM25 + vector)
rag_hybrid_enabled.description: Run vector retrieval and full-text retrieval in parallel, then merge results with RRF.

context_token_budget_enabled.label: Token budget truncation
context_token_budget_enabled.description: Automatically compute budget from the current model context window and trim sendable history.

context_max_turns.label: Compression trigger turns
context_max_turns.description: Trigger context compression when the conversation exceeds this turn count. Set 0 to disable this trigger.

context_compact_trigger_tokens.label: Compression token threshold
context_compact_trigger_tokens.description: Trigger context compression when accumulated message tokens exceed this value. Set 0 to disable this trigger.

context_compact_preserve_recent_turns.label: Recent turns to preserve
context_compact_preserve_recent_turns.description: Recent original turns to keep during compression. Older content is summarized.

context_compact_highlights_per_role.label: Highlights per role
context_compact_highlights_per_role.description: Maximum summary highlights retained for each user and assistant role during template compression.

context_compact_snippet_chars.label: Snippet character limit
context_compact_snippet_chars.description: Maximum characters retained in one message snippet during template compression.

context_artifact_retention_days.label: Evidence retention days
context_artifact_retention_days.description: Retention period for context evidence, including RAG results, historical evidence, and tool results. 0 disables automatic expiry.

compact_llm_enabled.label: LLM compression
compact_llm_enabled.description: Call a model to generate semantic summaries. When off, only template summaries are used.

compact_async_enabled.label: Async compression
compact_async_enabled.description: Run compression tasks asynchronously in the background to reduce blocking in the current response pipeline.

compact_task_model.label: Compression model
compact_task_model.description: Model used to generate compression summaries.

compact_max_failures.label: Circuit threshold
compact_max_failures.description: Consecutive failure threshold for LLM compression. After reaching it, the system falls back to template summaries.

compact_system_prompt.label: Full summary prompt
compact_system_prompt.description: Custom instruction sent to the LLM for full compression. Leave empty to use the built-in default.
compact_system_prompt.placeholder: Leave empty to use the default prompt

compact_light_prompt.label: Light summary prompt
compact_light_prompt.description: Custom instruction sent to the LLM for light compression. Leave empty to use the built-in default.
compact_light_prompt.placeholder: Leave empty to use the default prompt
